findings.evidence: Existing hits: `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:272:lemma normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_mk`; `Mathlib/Logic/Equiv/Defs.lean:282:theorem apply_eq_iff_eq`; the new proof at `TauCeti/Algebra/Group/NormalizerQuotient.lean:286-292` is exactly `congrArg`/`.injective` plus that simp lemma.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma, or replace consumers by `((Subgroup.normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal H).toEquiv.apply_eq_iff_eq).symm` followed by `simp [Subgroup.normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal_mk]`.
findings.issue: `normalizerQuotientMk_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_eq` duplicates the established equality transport through `normalizerQuotientEquivQuotientOfNormal`; it only applies the equivalence to both sides and rewrites representatives.

summary: One new normalizer quotient criterion is a parallel wrapper around the existing normal-case equivalence API. The fibre-orbit base criterion is not directly replaced by an existing named lemma under the same assumptions.
